title: Dr. Vandana Das murder: Convict Sandeep moves Kerala High Court claiming mental illness
description: Sandeep G, the man convicted for the 2023 murder of house surgeon Dr Vandana Das, has moved the Kerala High Court challenging his conviction and life sentence imposed by a Kollam session court. [Sandeep G v State of Kerala]A Bench of Justice Raja Vijayaraghavan V and Justice KV Jayakumar issued notice on the appeal to the State and posted the matter further consideration on July 9.Justice Raja Vijayaraghavan V and Justice KV JayakumarSandeep was sentenced to life imprisonment by the Additional D
